productName: Ooowee - JUICED 1G Infused PreRoll - Peach Passion - Truffle Oreos - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Truffle Oreos supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a soft, juicy peach flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
